2604.14586.title: CPGRec+: A Balance-oriented Framework for Personalized Video Game Recommendations
2604.14586.paper_summary: The rapid expansion of gaming industry requires advanced recommender systems tailored to its dynamic landscape. Existing Graph Neural Network (GNN)-based methods primarily prioritize accuracy over diversity, overlooking their inherent trade-off. To address this, we previously proposed CPGRec, a balance-oriented gaming recommender system. However, CPGRec fails to account for critical disparities in player-game interactions, which carry varying significance in reflecting players' personal preferences and may exacerbate over-smoothness issues inherent in GNN-based models. Moreover, existing approaches underutilize the reasoning capabilities and extensive knowledge of large language models (LLMs) in addressing these limitations. To bridge this gap, we propose two new modules. First, Preference-informed Edge Reweighting (PER) module assigns signed edge weights to qualitatively distinguish significant player interests and disinterests while then quantitatively measuring preference strength to mitigate over-smoothing in graph convolutions. Second, Preference-informed Representation Generation (PRG) module leverages LLMs to generate contextualized descriptions of games and players by reasoning personal preferences from comparing global and personal interests, thereby refining representations of players and games. Experiments on \textcolor{black}{two Steam datasets} demonstrate CPGRec+'s superior accuracy and diversity over state-of-the-art models. The code is accessible at https://github.com/HsipingLi/CPGRec-Plus.
2604.14586.paper_summary_zh: 遊戲產業的快速擴張需要針對其動態環境量身定制的先進推薦系統。現有的基於圖神經網絡（GNN）的方法主要優先考慮準確性而忽略了多樣性，未能考慮其固有的權衡。為了解決這個問題，我們之前提出了CPGRec，一個以平衡為導向的遊戲推薦系統。然而，CPGRec未能考慮玩家與遊戲互動中的關鍵差異，這些差異在反映玩家的個人偏好時具有不同的重要性，並可能加劇GNN模型固有的過平滑問題。此外，現有的方法在解決這些限制時未充分利用大型語言模型（LLMs）的推理能力和廣泛知識。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了兩個新模塊。首先，偏好信息邊緣重加權（PER）模塊為邊賦予符號權重，以質性區分重要的玩家興趣和不興趣，然後定量測量偏好強度，以減輕圖卷積中的過平滑。其次，偏好信息表示生成（PRG）模塊利用LLMs生成遊戲和玩家的上下文描述，通過比較全球和個人興趣推理個人偏好，從而精煉玩家和遊戲的表示。在\textcolor{black}{兩個Steam數據集}上的實驗顯示，CPGRec+在準確性和多樣性上優於最先進的模型。代碼可在https://github.com/HsipingLi/CPGRec-Plus訪問。
2604.14586.author: Xiping Li et.al.
2604.14586.authors: Xiping Li, Aier Yang, Jianghong Ma, Kangzhe Liu, Shanshan Feng, Haijun Zhang, Yi Zhao
